summary: Iteration 14 UI & Flow Alignments Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). UI testing verified all 10 features specified in the requirements.

issues: Minor: Console warning about <span> child in <select> element - doesn't affect functionality but should be cleaned up

seed_data_creation: Existing test data preserved from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 14 features verified. TAP/Bar/Table pages share consistent horizontal Kanban menu. KDS has 5 columns with Delayed as a real backend status.

features_tested.2_tap_horizontal_tabs: ✅ TAP page has horizontal category tabs at top: Beers, Cocktails, Spirits, Non-alcoholic, Snacks, Starters, Mains, Plates + Custom
features_tested.3_tap_items_as_rows: ✅ Items shown as clean rows (name + price + edit + delete). Category title centered and bold.
features_tested.4_tap_custom_form: ✅ Custom button opens form with name, price, category, Photo & Upload buttons. Creates item in menu.
features_tested.6_bar_horizontal_tabs: ✅ Bar page has same horizontal Kanban tabs: Cocktails, Beers, Spirits, Non-alcoholic, Snacks, Starters. Items as rows with edit/delete. Custom item with photo.
features_tested.7_table_kanban_menu: ✅ Table page has same Kanban menu tabs. Table grid with status badges (Available/Occupied).
features_tested.8_table_context_bar: ✅ Occupied tables show guest name + Tab #. Open table form has guest name + server selection dropdown.
features_tested.9_kds_5_columns: ✅ KDS has 5 columns: Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed. Cards are draggable. Drop zones visible.
features_tested.10_kds_delayed_status: ✅ Backend PUT /api/kds/ticket/{id}/status accepts status=delayed (verified in backend test). Delayed column shows delayed tickets.
features_tested.11_tabs_show_number: ✅ All open tabs show Tab # (e.g., TEST_EntryGuest #107, John Smith #123)

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/tap/catalog - Get catalog items with categories
GET /api/tap/sessions - Get open tabs with tab_number
GET /api/table/tables - Tables with status and tab_number
screenshots: .screenshots/02_tap_page_kanban.png - TAP page with horizontal category tabs and Custom form
.screenshots/03_bar_page.png - Bar page with horizontal Kanban tabs
.screenshots/05_table_page.png - Table page with grid and Kanban menu
.screenshots/06_table_open_form.png - Table open form with guest name and server dropdown

code_review_notes.observed_console_warnings: Minor React warning about <span> as child of <option> in TapPage category select - cosmetic issue only
